content:
ITEM 2. PROPERTIES
As of [DATE_TIME], our executive and principal offices for sales, marketing, professional and administrative services and development consist of approximately 2.1 million square feet of leased and owned property in [LOCATION]. Of this total, we lease and occupy approximately 1.3 million square feet and own and occupy a majority of the approximately 820,000 square feet of total owned space at 50 Fremont Street. Of the total leased and owned space in [LOCATION], 2.1 million square feet is concentrated in our urban campus, which includes 50 Fremont Street, 350 Mission Street, and Salesforce Tower located at 415 Mission Street ("Salesforce Tower"), collectively defined as our "Urban Campus". Each of the three buildings occupy one of the four corners of a major intersection in downtown [LOCATION]. In addition, we lease approximately 451,000 square feet in [LOCATION] that is currently sublet. This space is not included in the amounts above.
In [DATE_TIME], we entered into a lease agreement for approximately 325,000 rentable square feet of office space in a building to be constructed as part of our urban campus in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]. As of [DATE_TIME], construction has not commenced on the building and is dependent on the developer obtaining approvals from [LOCATION]. We expect to begin occupying the space in [DATE_TIME].
In [DATE_TIME], the Company entered into an agreement to purchase two real estate assets in [LOCATION], [LOCATION] for approximately 86,000 square feet of office space near our Urban Campus. The transaction is expected to close in the Company’s [DATE_TIME], subject to customary closing conditions.
We also lease space in various locations throughout [LOCATION] for local sales and professional services personnel. Our foreign subsidiaries lease office space in a number of countries in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION] for our international operations.
We also operate data centers in the [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION] pursuant to various co-location lease arrangements.
We believe that our existing facilities and offices are adequate to meet our current requirements. If we require additional space, we believe that we will be able to obtain such space on acceptable, commercially reasonable terms.
ITEM 3.
